channel.title: Blogging on BRYSGO
channel.description: Recent content in Blogging on BRYSGO

item.title: Back to the blog...
item.description:
Now I know this isn’t my first time promising more blog time but I’m renewing my vows.

I’m not going to be so rigid with my every day blog promise, but I will make an effort where possible. Also, I plan on doing something which I haven’t done before which is try to keep my blog posts up to date.

If you go back through my blog posts you will see edits and updates to make sure I can stay proud of my blog instead of being unconfident of stale blog posts.

item.title: Blogs on blogs on blogs
item.description:
I’ve decided to write a blog post every day, even if it is crappy. Why? Is it so I can feel important? Maybe, but I would never admit that. The reason I’m sticking to is that I want to get better at reflecting on important parts of my day.

It may help me appreciate all the interesting things I come across daily that are quickly relegated to a distant memory. Especially the seemingly mundane things I tend to take for granted. Writing about my day will help give meaning to at least one special thing that happened.
